extra.count_note: n_control_full is the full untreated sample; MatchIt's matched-data control count is a post-matching support diagnostic and is not the same estimand when matching with replacement.
extra.se_reference: The att_psm row compares point estimates only. StatsPAI reports se_pair_effect from the matched-pair effect dispersion, MatchIt does not define a canonical analytical SE and the R fixture records se_matchit_lm, while Stata teffects reports se_teffects_ai.
